text_original: I have buy the premium the app is best im 20 but I like this app so much it is nice u can download it for free and u have got free message to it's the nice app I have ever seen thanks mindzen ai
text_zh: 我买了会员，这个应用棒极了。我今年20岁，但我超级喜欢这个应用。它很好，你可以免费下载，而且还能免费发消息，这是我见过的最好的应用。谢谢 mindzen ai。
reply_original: Thank you so much for your amazing support and for upgrading to premium! Hearing that you love Fantasia so much truly motivates our team. We are glad you enjoy both the premium features and the free messages. If you ever have questions or ideas, feel free to email us at support@fantachat.ai. Have a wonderful time chatting!
reply_zh: 非常感谢您的大力支持以及升级为高级会员！听到您如此喜爱 Fantasia，真的给我们的团队带来了巨大的动力。我们很高兴您喜欢高级功能和免费消息。如果您有任何问题或想法，欢迎随时发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。祝您聊得开心！
